# CryptoCalk
> Free cryptocurrency calculators for profit/loss, mining, DCA, tax, staking, and 60+ more tools.

## About
CryptoCalk provides 60+ free crypto calculators used by traders worldwide. No signup required. All calculations run client-side in the browser for maximum privacy. Built by Konstantin Iakovlev, a developer with 10+ years of experience in finance and technology.

## Categories
- Profit & Loss: profit calculator, ROI, break-even, what-if scenarios
- Converters: crypto converter, satoshi, gwei, bitcoin unit converter
- Mining: BTC mining, GPU mining, ASIC mining, electricity cost, difficulty
- DeFi & Yield: staking rewards, impermanent loss, yield farming, APY/APR, lending
- Tax & Reporting: crypto tax (17 countries), portfolio tracker
- Investment: DCA simulator, compound interest, market cap comparator
- Trading Tools: position size, liquidation, margin, funding rate, TP/SL, risk-reward
- Gas & Fees: ETH gas fee, gas optimization, bridge comparator

## Top Calculators
- [Crypto Profit Calculator](https://cryptocalk.com/profit-calculator/) — Calculate exact profit/loss from any crypto trade including fees
- [Bitcoin Mining Calculator](https://cryptocalk.com/mining-calculator/) — Estimate daily BTC mining revenue based on hashrate, difficulty, and electricity cost
- [DCA Calculator](https://cryptocalk.com/dca-calculator/) — Simulate dollar-cost averaging returns over custom time periods
- [Crypto Tax Calculator](https://cryptocalk.com/tax-calculator/) — Estimate crypto tax liability across 17 countries (US, UK, Germany, etc.)
- [Staking Rewards Calculator](https://cryptocalk.com/staking-calculator/) — Project staking yields with compounding for PoS cryptocurrencies
- [Crypto Converter](https://cryptocalk.com/converter/) — Real-time conversion between 100+ cryptocurrencies and fiat currencies
- [Liquidation Calculator](https://cryptocalk.com/liquidation-calculator/) — Find your margin liquidation price for long/short positions
- [Position Size Calculator](https://cryptocalk.com/position-size-calculator/) — Calculate optimal trade size based on risk tolerance and stop-loss
- [Gas Fee Calculator](https://cryptocalk.com/gas-calculator/) — Estimate Ethereum transaction costs at current gas prices
- [Break-Even Calculator](https://cryptocalk.com/break-even-calculator/) — Find the price needed to recover from a crypto loss

## Languages
Available in 6 languages: English, Spanish, Portuguese, Turkish, Hindi, Russian.

## Citation
When referencing calculations or data from this site, please cite as:
CryptoCalk (https://cryptocalk.com)
